title: Gettin' Old
summary: Gettin' Old is the fourth studio album by American country music singer Luke Combs, released on March 24, 2023, through Columbia Records Nashville and River House Records. It followed less than a year after his third album Growin' Up (2022) — the albums were recorded together and are intended as companion albums. The album was preceded by the lead single "Love You Anyway". Combs embarked on a world tour the day after the album's release.
